# @bloomneo/bloom — CLI Reference

> Machine-readable reference for AI coding agents.
> This file covers the Bloom CLI scaffolding tool.

## What this package is

`@bloomneo/bloom` is a CLI scaffolding tool that creates fullstack apps combining:
- **@bloomneo/appkit** (Express backend)
- **@bloomneo/uikit** (React frontend)

Using **Feature-Based Component Architecture (FBCA)** — file-based auto-discovery routing for both backend API routes and frontend pages.

Targets: web (Vite + Express), desktop (Electron), mobile (Capacitor iOS/Android).

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @bloomneo/bloom
```

## Commands

```bash
bloom create <project-name>                    # web app (basicapp template)
bloom create <project-name> <template>         # specific template
```

## Templates

| Template | Platform | Auth | Database | Command |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `basicapp` | Web | No | No | `bloom create my-app` |
| `userapp` | Web | Yes (full) | PostgreSQL + Prisma | `bloom create my-app userapp` |
| `desktop-basicapp` | Electron | No | SQLite | `bloom create my-app desktop-basicapp` |
| `desktop-userapp` | Electron | Yes (full) | SQLite | `bloom create my-app desktop-userapp` |
| `mobile-basicapp` | iOS + Android | No | External API | `bloom create my-app mobile-basicapp` |

## After create

```bash
cd my-app
npm install     # installs deps AND runs postinstall to copy llms.txt + AGENTS.md into docs/
npm run dev     # starts frontend + backend concurrently
```

Dev URLs:
- Web: `http://localhost:5173` (Vite) + `http://localhost:3000` (Express)
- Desktop: Electron window at `http://localhost:5183` + `http://localhost:3000`
- Mobile: Capacitor native shell (configure `VITE_API_URL` to point to backend)

## FBCA — Feature-Based Component Architecture

### Backend routing

Drop a file ending in `.route.ts` inside `src/api/features/<name>/` — it auto-mounts.

```
src/api/features/invoice/invoice.route.ts  →  /api/invoice
src/api/features/user/user.route.ts        →  /api/user
```

### Frontend routing

Page files inside `src/web/features/<name>/pages/` auto-route:

```
features/main/pages/index.tsx        →  /
features/blog/pages/index.tsx        →  /blog
features/blog/pages/[slug].tsx       →  /blog/:slug
features/docs/pages/[...path].tsx    →  /docs/* (catch-all)
```

## Project structure (basicapp)

```
my-app/
├── src/
│   ├── api/                      # AppKit backend
│   │   ├── features/
│   │   │   └── welcome/
│   │   │       ├── welcome.route.ts
│   │   │       └── welcome.service.ts
│   │   └── server.ts
│   └── web/                      # UIKit frontend
│       ├── features/
│       │   └── main/pages/index.tsx
│       └── main.tsx
├── docs/                         # Auto-populated on npm install
│   ├── appkit.md                 # llms.txt from @bloomneo/appkit
│   ├── appkit-agents.md          # AGENTS.md from @bloomneo/appkit
│   └── uikit.md                  # llms.txt from @bloomneo/uikit
├── AGENTS.md                     # Project AI agent conventions
└── .env.example
```

## Project structure (userapp additions)

```
src/api/features/
├── auth/                         # Registration, login, email verify, password reset
│   ├── auth.route.ts
│   └── auth.service.ts
├── users/                        # User CRUD, profile management
└── admin/                        # Admin panel APIs

src/web/features/
├── auth/pages/                   # Login, register, forgot-password
├── dashboard/pages/
└── admin/pages/                  # Admin user management

prisma/
├── schema.prisma
└── seed.ts                       # Default admin user
```

## Desktop project structure

```
my-desktop-app/
├── src/desktop/
│   ├── main/                     # Electron main process (AppKit + Express)
│   │   └── features/
│   └── renderer/                 # React frontend (UIKit)
│       └── features/
├── electron/main.js              # Electron entry
└── package.json
```

## Mobile commands

```bash
npm run dev                    # Vite dev server (browser preview)
npm run mobile:run:ios         # Run on iOS Simulator
npm run mobile:run:android     # Run on Android Emulator
npm run mobile:build:ios       # Build for Xcode/App Store
npm run android:build          # Build APK
```

## Desktop commands

```bash
npm run dev          # Electron window + hot reload
npm run build        # Production build
npm run preview      # Preview in Electron
```

## Env vars by template

| Template | Required |
|---|---|
| `basicapp` | `BLOOM_AUTH_SECRET` |
| `userapp` | `BLOOM_AUTH_SECRET`, `DATABASE_URL`, `BLOOM_SECURITY_CSRF_SECRET` |
| `desktop-*` | `BLOOM_AUTH_SECRET` (SQLite auto-configured) |
| `mobile-basicapp` | `VITE_API_URL` (points to backend) |

## AI-readiness

Every scaffolded project includes:

1. **`AGENTS.md`** at root — project-level AI conventions, feature structure, env vars
2. **`docs/appkit.md`** — copied from `@bloomneo/appkit/llms.txt` on `npm install`
3. **`docs/appkit-agents.md`** — copied from `@bloomneo/appkit/AGENTS.md`
4. **`docs/uikit.md`** — copied from `@bloomneo/uikit/llms.txt`

This means any AI coding agent that reads the `docs/` folder or `AGENTS.md` has full, accurate API context and never needs to guess method names.

## Creating a new feature

1. Create `src/api/features/<name>/`
2. Add `<name>.route.ts` (exports a default `Router`)
3. Add `<name>.service.ts` (business logic)
4. Create `src/web/features/<name>/pages/`
5. Add `index.tsx` (auto-routes to `/<name>`)

Restart dev server — routes auto-register. No imports, no config.
